items.title: Types are checked, then erased
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR A["app.ts
typed source"] --> B{"tsc type-check"} B -- errors --> E["fix before build"] B -- ok --> C["app.js
plain JS, types removed"] C --> D["runtime
Node / browser"] E --> A
items.caption: TypeScript checks types at compile time and emits plain JavaScript; no type information exists at runtime.
